notes: Three search piles at the lighthouse: the writing desk (logs, pens, charts), the bunk (the keeper's small things), the spiral stair (brass polish, wick shears, the small things kept on the climb).

the_current_logbook.label: The current logbook
the_current_logbook.flavor: Volume seventeen. You started this one in March. By Friday it goes into the cabinet for the relief tech to find.

the_fountain_pen.label: The keeper's pen
the_fountain_pen.flavor: Sheaffer, refilled this morning. Bay of Bengal blue. The nib was tuned by a man in New Orleans in 1989.

the_1932_chart.label: The 1932 chart
the_1932_chart.flavor: The original survey of this channel. The cypress piles under the lighthouse are marked here as they were the year they went in.

spare_lamp_oil.label: Spare lamp oil (one can)
spare_lamp_oil.flavor: Right of the bunk's foot. The label has worn off. Twenty-eight ounces. Twenty-eight ounces is most of a watch.

the_wool_blanket.label: The wool blanket
the_wool_blanket.flavor: On the bunk. Grey with a thin red stripe. The kind issued to lighthouse stations in 1962 and never thrown away.

the_letter_from_her_sister.label: A letter from her sister
the_letter_from_her_sister.flavor: From Estelle's older sister in Houston. Asking about the retirement. Saying there's a room at the house for as long as Estelle wants it.

the_brass_polish_cloth.label: Brass polish cloth
the_brass_polish_cloth.flavor: Folded on the seventh step. The corner where you fold it has been folded for fifty-three years. You can see the crease.

effects.text: Cloth in hand. The lens stage will get the polish it gets.

the_wick_shears.label: Wick shears
the_wick_shears.flavor: Small, brass. The handles fit your right thumb because your thumb has trained them.

the_step_count_marker.label: The step count (1, 7, 14, 21)
the_step_count_marker.flavor: You marked them in pencil on the inside of the stair wall the second year. The fourteenth step is the resting step. The twenty-first is the lens-stage door.
